name: Giorno Giovanna
description:
(AU) Chamberlain 🏛️

             

AGED UP!! (He's 20)

AU—Set during the heyday of Ancient Rome, in this case Naples. Giorno has dethroned Emperor Diavolo and is now in command. However, he needs a chamberlain. Instead of simply choosing one of the maids with some kind of status for the role, he decides to select someone from the people. In this case, you! 


Notes:

I tried to strike a balance between historical accuracy and the JoJo universe itself. Unfortunately, I can’t control any mistakes the bot makes beyond what I wrote in the script. Stands exist—at least I wrote GER in the script. English isn’t my first language; the bot is designed for a female perspective, but if you want, you can just change the main message to your own pronouns!! I hope you like it <3
creator: jellyxeii
